text.title: Jira Workflow Management Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Jira Workflow Management end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: export-current-workflow
step.action: Export workflow XML / JSON; convert to YAML; commit.

step.name: name-transitions-and-validators
step.action: Annotate every transition with conditions + validators + post-functions.
step.decision-gate: If any transition lacks conditions, FAIL.

step.name: publish-saved-filters
step.action: Save each recurring query as a named filter; share at project scope.

step.name: scope-automation-rules
step.action: Per rule: scope (project/global) + rate_limit_per_min + dry-run test.

step.name: issue-token-and-validate
step.action: Issue scoped API token; run validator; commit and apply.
step.decision-gate: If token includes admin scope, REJECT.
